subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter had a wondrous effect, for it was filled with sighs and lamentations from the merciless self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان تحریرت تاثیری عجیب داشت زیرا آه و فغان از دست نفس بی امان از
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @knowledge of self, @meditation, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
